title: Verify deterministic classification outcomes
preconditions: Representative projections, active categories, rule sets covering same-category overlap, incompatible overlap, no-match, and unchanged replay are available.
steps: Evaluate every outcome partition; repeat identical fingerprints; inspect ordered totals and Ledger state before and after.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-DETERMINISTIC-EVALUATION holds: every item has exactly one correct outcome, repeated results are identical, conflicts never select a winner, and evaluation performs no mutation.
